title: epipactis procera
intro: Epipactis procera, also known as the tall helleborine, is a type of orchid native to Europe, western Asia, and North Africa. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Epipactis procera include its ability to treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve digestion. The plant can be prepared as an infusion or decoction to utilize its medicinal properties, although it is essential to consult a healthcare professional before using it as a treatment.
